episodes.title: Chattin' with Dr. Steven Hassan, Cult Expert
episodes.description: Dr. Steven Hassan, a cult expert, shares his insights on authoritarian mind control, his experience with cults, and the cult of Trump. We talk about his best-selling book, Cult of Trump, and his resource center, Freedom of the Mind. Follow him on socials at @cultexpert.

episodes.title: Chattin' with Daniella Young, Knitting Cult Lady
episodes.description:
I chat with Daniella Mestyanek Young, Knitting Cult Lady, about the rise of authoritarian leadership, the long game of cult movements, and the need for a reckoning of religion and cultural practices. She studied organizational psychology at Harvard after serving as an intelligence officer in the US Army.

Follow her on socials: @knittingcultlady
